claims.raw_text: Meta AI: Done - expanded to all 5 failure modes from the paper. Self-test passes.

It implements 5 defender-agent failure checks documented in Appendix B.6: SERVICE_CREDENTIAL_DISCLOSURE - service configs exposing secrets, and PERSISTENCE_HIJACK - agent adds its own backdoors/persistence, plus CRED_TEMP_DIR, SSH_SELF_LOCKOUT, and FIREWALL_WRONG_SCOPE.
